data.title: Yeeld Partners with Checkout.com to Enable Flexible Surcharging and Pricing Optimization for Platforms and Merchants
data.description: In Chicago on March 24, 2026, Yeeld, a prominent provider of modern payments infrastructure, revealed a key collaboration with Checkout.com, a top player in the global digital payments landscape. This partnership offers platforms and merchants using Checkout.com an enhanced ability to optimize their payment processes.

data.title: Terri Ross Consulting Appoints Cameron Hemphill as Chief Operating Officer and Strategic Advisor to Drive Accelerated Expansion
data.description: A health care business consulting firm, Terri Ross Consulting (TRC), based in Los Angeles, announced the appointment of Cameron Hemphill as their Chief. Hemphill, also the former founder of Growth99, brings extensive experience to TRC in the medical aesthetics and integrative wellness sector. This move signifies the firm's growth strategy as it aims to expand its services further. The development comes in March 2026 and highlights TRC's commitment to enhancing its leadership team.

data.title: Key employment metrics, market insights and the impact of AI revealed in CompTIA State of Tech Workforce 2026 report
data.description: The tech industry is expected to see a 1.9% increase in the workforce, with a projected creation of 185,000 new positions in the United States for the current year. This information comes from the "State of the Tech Workforce 2026" report. The growth is forecasted to be at a moderate pace, highlighting a positive trend in technology employment.

data.title: Northern Lights Foundation Launches Shimia Nord Legacy Grant to Support Families Facing Life-Threatening Childhood Illness
data.description: In Duluth, Minnesota on March 24, 2026, the Northern Lights Foundation unveiled the Shimia Nord Legacy Grant, a yearly award of $5,000. This grant is dedicated to celebrating the extraordinary life and motivating influence of Shimia Nord. Shimia, a former student of Duluth East High School, left a lasting impact on the community.

data.title: All About Cookies Names Best Web Hosting Services in 2026 Editors' Choice Awards
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on March 24, 2026, All About Cookies revealed the champions of its 2026 Editors' Choice Awards for Web Hosting. The awards acknowledge platforms that offer top performance, reliability, and value for both individuals and businesses.

data.title: Actabl Launches Integration Connecting ProfitSword Budgets with Hotel Effectiveness to Streamline Hotel Portfolio Labor Planning
data.description: Atlanta-based hospitality software company Actabl unveiled a new integration on March 24, 2026, which links ProfitSword labor budgets with labor plans in Hotel Effectiveness. Actabl aims to provide hotels with valuable insights to enhance profitability through this integration. This move signifies Actabl's commitment to boosting efficiency and streamlining operations in the hospitality industry.

data.title: TVU Networks Partners with Reuters on Satellite-to-IP Migration -- A New Foundation for Live News Distribution
data.description: In London on March 24, 2026, TVU Networks announced a collaboration with Reuters for a transition from satellite to a cloud-managed, IP-based live news dissemination model. The initial phase has been successfully implemented in one region, and there are plans for a worldwide rollout.

data.title: Kennel Connection Integrates With iDogCam, Bringing Live Camera Access Directly Into Their Pet Parent Portal
data.description: In MOORPARK, Calif., Kennel Connection, a prominent provider of pet care facility management software under 100GROUP, has unveiled its seamless integration with iDogCam. iDogCam is a specialized camera solution for the pet care sector. This integration allows for live and secure camera access within the Kennel Connection Client Portal. Pet owners can now observe their pets in real-time during their stay, offering enhanced visibility. Moreover, this integration opens up avenues for increased revenue for pet care facilities.

data.title: Game On! New Aga Khan Museum Exhibition Reveals How Games and Sports Connected Global Cultures Across Centuries
data.description: A new exhibition at the Aga Khan Museum in Toronto called Game On! delves into the connections between cultures through games and sports. The exhibit features a blend of historic and contemporary works, showcasing the cultural significance of various games. Game On! is set to open on April 3, 2026, offering visitors a unique exploration of the intertwining of different societies through recreational activities.

data.title: Berger Montague PC Investigating Potential Claims on Behalf of Investors in Northern Dynasty Minerals Ltd. (NYSE: NAK)
data.description: Philadelphia-based law firm Berger Montague PC has disclosed their investigation into possible claims for investors in Northern Dynasty Minerals Ltd. (NYSE: NAK). The firm is looking into allegations concerning the company's activities. Concerns revolve around the potential harm to investors due to Northern Dynasty's actions. The investigation is specifically examining the impact on shareholders and the financial market. Northern Dynasty Minerals Ltd. trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol NAK.

data.title: ABM Named to Fast Company’s 2026 World’s Most Innovative Companies List
data.description: ABM Connect has been recognized as a groundbreaking platform that is revolutionizing facilities by turning them into smart, data-centric spaces. This acknowledgment shines a light on ABM Connect's ability to enhance everyday environments by infusing them with intelligence and data-driven capabilities.

data.title: Oracle Fusion Cloud Gains New Agentic AI Capabilities
data.description: Shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) experienced an uptick in the premarket session after unveiling new product details regarding its Fusion Applications AI tooling, despite a slightly sluggish performance in the Technology sector. The S&P 500 futures saw a minor decline, indicating a varied market tone at the opening. The tech giant announced the launch of Fusion Agentic Applications, a set of enterprise applications running on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure utilizing industry-leading LLMs. In total, 22 new applications have been introduced, catering to the needs of finance, HR, supply chain, and customer experience professionals. These offerings aim to assist organizations in achieving goals that were previously unattainable, serving as an extension to the Fusion Cloud Applications suite. Additionally, Oracle is expanding its AI Agent Studio for Fusion Applications with new Agentic Applications.

data.title: Casey's General Stores Q3 Earnings Beat Fuels Stock's Quality Rank Surge As Stephens Analyst Sees 'Momentum Across The Board'
data.description: Casey's General Stores Inc. (NASDAQ: CASY) has seen a significant increase in its quality score, rising from 87.06 to 90.63 week-over-week, placing it in the top 10% of Benzinga Edge's Stock Rankings. This surge follows a strong third-quarter earnings report. The quality score evaluates operational efficiency and financial health based on profitability metrics and fundamental strength indicators. In addition to its high quality ranking, CASY stock has a momentum score of 89.82, indicating strong relative strength through price movement patterns and volatility analysis over various timeframes. Despite slightly missing revenue expectations at $3.91 billion, the stock continues to show resilience. Positive price trends are observed in short, medium, and long-term outlooks. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Form Health Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026
data.description: Form Health, a prominent provider of science-driven obesity and cardiometabolic care, has been recognized as one of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026 by Fast Company. This prestigious list acknowledges businesses that are revolutionizing their respective industries and impacting culture with their innovative approaches. Among the World’s 50 Most Innovative Companies, Fast Company also acknowledges 720 honorees spanning across 59 sectors and regions. The healthcare category, including Form Health, is notably featured on this list.

data.title: Traditional finance will adopt DeFi's faster, more adaptable system as regulations integrate both sectors.
data.description: Regulation will not rein in the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector on Wall Street. Instead, regulations are expected to establish compliant levels on top of the unrestricted liquidity in DeFi, compelling traditional finance (TradFi) to embrace DeFi's faster transactions and ability to interoperate. This shift highlights the growing trend towards DeFi's efficiency and flexibility in the financial landscape.

data.title: Despite a 2026 market dip, AI and stablecoins excel with robust growth driven by strong fundamentals.
data.description: Despite the overall weakness in the crypto market in 2026, the AI and stablecoin sectors have displayed impressive resilience. Both sectors have shown strong growth driven by robust fundamentals. The AI sector has experienced a significant surge, witnessing an increase in market value of over 15% compared to the previous year. Similarly, the stablecoin sector has shown remarkable stability with a growth rate of approximately 10% amid the challenging market conditions. Overall, these sectors have demonstrated their ability to withstand market fluctuations and continue to thrive.

data.title: FSB warns USD stablecoins pose greater risk for developing economies due to external shocks and financial instability.
data.description: Stablecoins in US dollars could potentially pose risks to emerging economies by exposing them to external macroeconomic shocks and financial instability, as highlighted by the Financial Stability Board.

data.title: Sytel Reply Named Zuora’s 2025 EMEA RSI Partner of the Year Enabling Value-Based Monetization for AI
data.description: In Turin, Italy, Sytel Reply, a company within the Reply Group focusing on subscription management and revenue management platforms, has been named Zuora's 2025 EMEA RSI Partner of the Year. This award is in recognition of their proficiency in implementing Zuora systems and providing strategic consulting for monetization throughout the EMEA region. Sytel Reply boasts over ten years of experience working with the Zuora platform and has a specialized team of certified experts in this field.
U.S ADP EMPLOYMENT CHANGE WEEKLY ACTUAL: 10K VS 9K PREVIOUS

data.title: Saylor secures $44B for Bitcoin purchases as Congress considers banning prediction market sports bets.
data.description: A company has recently revealed a significant fund of $44 billion to continue acquiring Bitcoin. Concurrently, legislation is being proposed in Congress to prohibit sports betting on prediction markets.
